title: Forestry Hives Jappafied
description: Making Forestry's Bee Hives fit the aesthetic of Jappa's 1.15 Vanilla Minecraft Bee Hive texture and the overall 1.14+ Minecraft style!
body:
A resource pack that makes Forestry's various Bee Hives fit the aesthetic of Jappa's 1.15 Vanilla Minecraft Bee Hive texture and the overall 1.14+ Minecraft style. Compatibility for add-ons will come in the future!

 

Forestry must be installed to see the new textures.
https://modrinth.com/mod/forestry
